category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Qatar.

title.en: China-to-Guyana EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入圭亚那：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入圭亞那：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Guyana GNBS product conformity and registration practice, GEA energy-sector coordination, GPL grid connection requirements, 120/240 V 60 Hz electrical conditions, IEC 61851 safety and IEC 61000 EMC baselines, Americas J1772 / CCS1 connector expectations, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与圭亚那GNBS产品符合性及注册实务、GEA能源部门协调、GPL并网要求、120/240 V 60 Hz电气条件、IEC 61851安全及IEC 61000 EMC基线、美洲J1772 / CCS1接口预期，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與圭亞那GNBS產品符合性及註冊實務、GEA能源部門協調、GPL併網要求、120/240 V 60 Hz電氣條件、IEC 61851安全及IEC 61000 EMC基線、美洲J1772 / CCS1接口預期，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Guyana, the practical gaps are GNBS conformity and importer/manufacturer registration for electrical equipment, GPL grid coordination for installations on a 120/240 V, 60 Hz Americas-style supply, IEC 61851 and IEC 61000 evidence for safety, EMC and power quality, and connector hardware changes from China GB/T 20234 to the locally deployed or project-specified connector. Guyana's EV charging market is still nascent and official sources reviewed as of 2026-06-14 did not confirm a single national EVSE connector mandate; because Guyana is an Americas-grid market, exporters should expect SAE J1772 Type 1 AC and CCS Combo 1 DC in many deployments, but must confirm the exact J1772/CCS1 requirement with GEA, GNBS, GPL, the vehicle importer, and the site owner before quoting or shipping. GB/T-connector chargers are physically incompatible with J1772 / CCS1 vehicle inlets without hardware redesign.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入圭亚那时，实务差距包括：电气设备需满足GNBS符合性及进口商/制造商注册要求；安装需与GPL协调并适配120/240 V、60 Hz美洲式供电；需提供IEC 61851及IEC 61000安全、EMC和电能质量证据；并须将中国GB/T 20234接口硬件改为当地部署或项目规范要求的接口。截至2026年6月14日审阅的官方来源未确认圭亚那存在单一全国EVSE接口强制标准；鉴于圭亚那属于美洲电网环境，出口商应预期许多部署采用SAE J1772 Type 1交流和CCS Combo 1直流，但在报价或发货前必须向GEA、GNBS、GPL、车辆进口商和场地方确认具体J1772/CCS1要求。GB/T接口充电桩如不进行硬件重新设计，无法与J1772 / CCS1车辆接口物理兼容。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入圭亞那時，實務差距包括：電氣設備需滿足GNBS符合性及進口商/製造商註冊要求；安裝需與GPL協調並適配120/240 V、60 Hz美洲式供電；需提供IEC 61851及IEC 61000安全、EMC和電能質量證據；並須將中國GB/T 20234接口硬體改為當地部署或項目規範要求的接口。截至2026年6月14日審閱的官方來源未確認圭亞那存在單一全國EVSE接口強制標準；鑑於圭亞那屬於美洲電網環境，出口商應預期許多部署採用SAE J1772 Type 1交流和CCS Combo 1直流，但在報價或發貨前必須向GEA、GNBS、GPL、車輛進口商和場地方確認具體J1772/CCS1要求。GB/T接口充電樁如不進行硬體重新設計，無法與J1772 / CCS1車輛接口物理兼容。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, GNBS scope determination, GEA approval, GPL grid-connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, charge-point operators, and installers should verify current Guyana conformity assessment rules, GPL connection requirements, IEC standard editions, connector requirements, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、GNBS适用范围裁定、GEA批准、GPL并网批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、充电点运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行圭亚那合格评定规则、GPL接入要求、IEC标准版本、接口要求及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、GNBS適用範圍裁定、GEA批准、GPL併網批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、充電點運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行圭亞那合格評定規則、GPL接入要求、IEC標準版本、接口要求及安裝規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
